reviews.review_title: Good idea with a not bad of a execution
reviews.review_description:
(This is gonna be a bit long)

Roadside. This game genuinely has potential to become an extremely popular game since the mechanics are extremely simple yet fun to do, so in this review, I’ll be going over the pros and cons, as well as talking about a few extra things.

Pros:

1. Building your shop and making money is genuinely fun except when people keep killing and robbing you, (more on that later) and can allow some really fun interactions with people

2. The gun mechanics are well made and not hyper confusing like with other games, making it so you can just pick up stuff and start shooting.

3. The community is somewhat small, but if you find the right people you can create gang, terrorize people, and basically become the king of your server.

5. Although the main things that people focus on are the killing and making shops, the other things like robbing the bank with the hard drive to get Gold is a genuinely interesting thing you can do and it’s cool that you can do that


Now, the cons:

1. Remember when I was talking about how it isn’t fun to get your shop robbed? well let me explain on that a bit more. I understand getting your shop robbed as a normal part of a game, but it can get super excessive when multiple players come back to keep robbing and terrorizing your shop, making it so you can’t even do anything.

2. The community is actually pretty racist and toxic as it’s comprised of younger children, meaning that there’s only a select few that you can really have the maximum amount of fun with.

3. Sometimes people just genuinely target you if you kill them while they have stacked stuff., making it so you either have to hide inside a building and try to stack up gear while they’re pounding on your door, or just leave the game.

4. Most of the buildings have a little areas that for some reason I have little holes in them. obviously you can cover these up, but I can’t tell you how many times I’ve died inside my shop because I didn’t know there was those little cracks there

5. Just kind of a lack of items to sell, which isn’t really that bad, since usually people die every three seconds and come back to buy stuff, but from what I’ve seen the only things people buy are armor, guns, and heals.

I would like to add that most of these cons are pretty situational and the pros outweigh it a lots

Havent even played the game yet ima edit this review when i play

(Edit) actually exceeded my expectations, only thing id say is my frames are pretty low on it, even though it looks like its very optimized due to the graphics, overall id say like 7/10 game, would be 9 if the graphics were good

developer_response.body: We've fixed a lot of issues since this review, if you have more problems let us know !

reviews.review_description: The concept is really fun but the cars are very janky and the community is pretty toxic I was trying to build my base when it all got bombed and I had restart everything which happens very often. Also I noticed an issue where if you delete a prop you put down it takes a while for everyone to see it deleted for them it’s still there and still effects them.

The game is pretty good. you can make your own shop. But the graphics are not that good. a lot of toxic kids. roadside sometimes glitches better fix that. The bank is a little bit broken. and I don't understand why you need an internet jammer. for suggestions add more ways to earn  money and a way to spend them. also fix your map. Here Are a lot of ways to make the game better. pls continue to develop this gem.

developer_response.body: Thanks! This is just an early access release so we are bringing lots of improvements soon!

reviews.review_description: It’s a cool game, but I can’t even set up a shop without getting killed or robbed. I followed the tutorial on how to lock the car that doesn’t work. It is a good concept, but the people are toxic also voice chat doesn’t work for me.

developer_response.body: Hey there, were looking into fixing all issues. Please message me on Discord on everything you've seen and any feedback you have.

reviews.review_description: Community is toxic, model isn’t made properly, game isn’t even explained properly and money making is the slowest thing ever. Let’s not forget your granted purchases right as soon as you get into a lobby and get the only music you’ll hear in the game is the main menu and phonk.

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear you had a bad time, we have a HUGE update coming soon bringing a lot of updates and balancing changes.

reviews.review_description: I love your game it is so fun but you need to add some things like outfits to make your character look better also walkie talkie’s to communicate from far and maybe a new gun like and rpg adding to that new maps that are bigger for using the cars in addition maybe spray paint and planes to sky dive from and drop any ware also maybe a health bar to see your health when people shoot you
Very fun and exciting I can play for hours grinding
Honestly i SO annoying i followed the tutorial but i still cant get in the car, lock it and i just get killed everytime please FIX THE GAME you can barely do anything plus the community is toxic

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you had a bad time, we're making entering cars easier next update. We're also adding multiple spawns to address spawn killing. If you have anymore feedback on how we can improve, please let us know!

reviews.review_description: Gta but vr
That’s all

developer_response.body: Hey there, were sorry to hear you had a bad time. This is just an early access release, and if you have feedback on how to make the game better let us know!

reviews.review_description: It's very fun for people who don't want to spend money or don't have much money for games and what the fump do you expect from a free game GTA 6 graphics🫩

reviews.review_title: One of the best games I've played.
reviews.review_description: I've played many free games, and this one exceeded my expectations. The graphics are good, but graphics aside, the game is awesome! The way businesses work is very cool.
it’s pretty good but as i’ve noticed i can’t hear people in game (with voice chat on) and when i buy a property door don’t open

developer_response.body: Many of these issues have been fixed! Please message us if you have more problems.

reviews.review_description: I got this game tutorial was long but needed but my problem was not being able to load in. First impressions bad.

developer_response.body: Hi, during this time we were having server issues. Apologies for the inconvenience.

reviews.review_description: Everyone just stands in the parking lot while 1 person just shoots everyone. The game is buggy. Noone starts a shop. The shooting is awful.

developer_response.body: We're sorry to hear you had a bad time. This is only an Early Access release, so we are far from being done. Tons of cool new content, fixes, and quality of life improvements next update!
